ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_vocabulary_uri" TEXT /* Source vocabulary URI for the source */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the source is trusted */,
  "last_verified_date" TEXT /* Last date the source was verified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the term */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the term was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the term */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabulary" (
  "vocabulary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vocabulary */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vocabulary */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vocabulary */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the vocabulary is public or private */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the vocabulary was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocabulary_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocabulary_terms" (
  "vocabulary_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocabulary term */,
  "vocabulary_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vocabulary the term belongs to */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term itself */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the term is custom or part of a standard vocabulary */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the term was added to the vocabulary */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the term in the vocabulary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocabulary_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vocabulary_terms_vocabulary_id FOREIGN KEY ("vocabulary_id") REFERENCES vocabulary ("vocabulary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_relationships" (
  "term_relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term relationship */,
  "term_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first term in the relationship */,
  "term_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second term in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonym, antonym) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the relationship */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_relationships_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_history" (
  "term_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term history entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term being updated */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the term was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, deletion) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the term before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the term after the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "glossary" (
  "glossary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each glossary entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term being defined */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the term */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the glossary entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the glossary entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the glossary entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("glossary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_glossary_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acronyms" (
  "acronym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acronym */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym itself */,
  "expansion" TEXT /* Expansion of the acronym */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the acronym entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the acronym entry was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the acronym entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acronym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acronyms_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
